channel.title: Mental Game Monday - My Mental Caddy™
channel.description: Your weekly mental game tip to help you think better, recover faster, and play golf with more confidence.

item.title: Mental Game Monday - June 22, 2026
item.description:
This Week's Mental Cue

"The pressure usually comes from what you make the score mean."

Why It Matters

Golfers fear what the score says about them more than the score itself.

Do This On Your Next Shot

Ask: “What am I making this score mean about me?”

Take the Mental Game Quiz →
